Hermès Herbag 31 - Rare Brown Leather & Gold Hardware

Product Details:
Model: Herbag 31
Style: Shoulder Bag
Dimensions: 31 x 26 x 10 cm
Material: Leather and Canvas
Hardware: Gold-tone (GHW)

Key Features:
An exceptionally rare find featuring beautiful brown leather paired with highly sought-after gold hardware. This piece comes with two interchangeable canvas bodies in highly versatile colors, allowing you to effortlessly switch up your style. The gold hardware elevates the bag, making it a highly desirable investment piece on the market.

Condition Report:
Excellent condition (98% New). The bag has been exceptionally well maintained and presents beautifully overall. Please review all photos carefully before placing your order to appreciate its excellent state.
